allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4322 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Detenido PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } catch {} } } else { "No hay proceso escuchando en 4322" }; Remove-Item -Path "C:\\Users\\Arukado69\\Documents\\kalidapresio2.0\\dev.log","C:\\Users\\Arukado69\\Documents\\kalidapresio2.0\\page.html" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Limpieza de temporales OK")

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept-Language: es-MX,es;q=0.9" "https://www.mercadolibre.com.mx/ofertas" -o ml_ofertas.html -w "HTTP %{http_code} | bytes %{size_download}\\n" --max-time 30)

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import {readFileSync} from "node:fs"; const d=JSON.parse\(readFileSync\("src/data/ofertas.json","utf-8"\)\); console.log\("total:", d.length\); d.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(o=>console.log\(`  [${o.score_kalidad_presio}] $${o.precio_actual} ${o.rating}★\(${o.opiniones}\) -${o.descuento}% | ${o.titulo?.slice\(0,45\)}`\)\); console.log\("campos:", Object.keys\(d[0]\).join\(", "\)\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import {readFileSync} from "node:fs"; const d=JSON.parse\(readFileSync\("src/data/ofertas.json","utf-8"\)\); console.log\("total:",d.length,"| campos:",Object.keys\(d[0]\).join\(", "\)\); console.log\("con MÁS VENDIDO:", d.filter\(o=>o.mas_vendido\).length, "| vendedor reputado:", d.filter\(o=>o.vendedor_confiable\).length\); d.slice\(0,4\).forEach\(o=>console.log\(`  KP${o.score_kalidad_presio} Conf${o.confianza} ${o.rating}★\(${o.opiniones}\) ${o.mas_vendido?"[MÁS VENDIDO]":""} ${o.vendedor_confiable?"[rep]":""} | ${o.titulo?.slice\(0,40\)}`\)\);')

PowerShell($h = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Arukado69\\Documents\\kalidapresio2.0\\dist\\index.html" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @\('Sello Kalidad-Precio: combina', 'data-kp-tip', 'Ver oferta', 'Próximamente más ofertas relámpago', 'Quiénes somos', 'apoyas su mantenimiento', 'Bricolage'\) | ForEach-Object { "{0,-50} -> {1}" -f $_, \([regex]::Matches\($h, [regex]::Escape\($_\)\).Count\) })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4321 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; if \($p\) { $proc = Get-Process -Id $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 4321 -> PID $p \($\($proc.ProcessName\)\), started $\($proc.StartTime\)" } else { "4321 free" })
PowerShell($env:SKIP_EXTRACCION = 'true'; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "omitido|Complete|error" | Select-Object -First 4)

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./dist/data/relampago.json'\); const now=Date.now\(\); const vivas=j.ofertas.filter\(o=>new Date\(o.endsAt\)>now\); console.log\('detectadoEl:', j.detectadoEl\); console.log\('total ofertas:', j.ofertas.length, '| vivas \(endsAt futuro\):', vivas.length\); console.log\('ejemplo:', j.ofertas[0].titulo.slice\(0,30\), '| endsAt:', j.ofertas[0].endsAt\);")
